resume.summary: Reliable and technically-minded B.Tech student with hands-on experience troubleshooting hardware, software, and network issues. Strong understanding of system administration fundamentals and customer-facing support. Seeking an IT Support Internship to apply problem-solving skills in a live environment.

education.coursework: Relevant Coursework: Network Administration, Troubleshooting & Diagnostics, IT Service Management, Operating Systems, Cybersecurity Basics

technicalSkills.skillGroup: Troubleshooting, Hardware/Software Support, Network Basics, Ticketing Systems
Windows/Linux Administration, Active Directory (basic), Remote Desktop Tools
Office 365 Administration, Basic Networking (TCP/IP, DNS, DHCP)

experience.title: IT Support Intern — Synapse Analytics Pvt. Ltd., Pune

bullets.bullet: Resolved 200+ helpdesk tickets covering hardware, software, and network connectivity issues.
Set up and configured 40+ employee workstations, reducing onboarding setup time by 30%.
Maintained IT asset inventory and documentation, improving audit readiness.
Assisted in setting up a 30-machine computer lab with shared printers and domain access.
Configured DHCP and basic firewall rules, reducing connectivity complaints by 50%.
Built a lightweight ticketing system for tracking and resolving internal IT requests.
Reduced average ticket resolution tracking time by 20% through status automation.
Organised a workshop teaching 50+ students basic hardware diagnostics and repair.
Created a troubleshooting flowchart adopted as a reference guide by the college lab.

achievements.achievement: Selected among 80 students college-wide for the Smart India Hackathon (SIH 2024) internal round.
Received the Academic Excellence Award for Semester 2 with the highest GPA (9.3) in the CSE department cohort of 120 students.
Active contributor to two college-wide technical fests, coordinating logistics and technical sessions for 150+ participants.

extracurricular.activity: Core Member, Technical Club, VIT Pune — organised hands-on workshops for 150+ students (2023–Present).
Technical Blogger — published articles on Medium covering tools and best practices relevant to the field; collectively read 4,000+ times.
Volunteer Mentor, CodeForGood (NGO Initiative) — guided 15 high school students through technology fundamentals over an 8-week programme.
